name: ai-zippy-child/faq-grid
title: FAQ Grid
description: Two-column FAQ section with expandable question items.

default.question: General Questions
default.answer: Learn about our operating hours, location details, and general clinic policies. We strive to provide a seamless administrative experience.

default.question: Medical Care
default.answer: Information regarding chronic disease management, acute consultations, and our approach to primary healthcare for all age groups.

default.question: Health Screening
default.answer: Details on our comprehensive health screening packages, including pre-screening preparation and post-screening reviews.

default.question: Vaccinations
default.answer: Stay protected with our range of vaccinations for children, adults, and travelers. We follow the National Childhood Immunization Schedule.

default.question: Payment & Subsidies
default.answer: We accept CHAS, Medisave, and various corporate insurance schemes. Find out how you can maximize your subsidies with us.

default.question: Visiting the Clinic
default.answer: Directions for transport, parking facilities near Block 455, and what to bring for your first visit to Holistic Care.
